---
title: "COVID-19 Is History's Biggest Translation Challenge"
description: "Translators Without Borders, CMU, and major tech firms team up on TICO-19."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-08-23"
categories: [NLP, multilingual, society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![COVID-19 translation challenge. Image from [WIRED](https://www.wired.com/story/covid-language-translation-problem/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"In the long run, Translators Without Borders aims to help with this tech problem too, through a project known as the Translation Initiative for Covid-19 (TICO-19). TWB is working with researchers at Carnegie Mellon and a who's who of major tech companies including Microsoft, Google, Facebook, and Amazon (with the notable exception of Apple) to translate Covid-related materials in 36 languages through these companies' networks of translators (and on their dimes)."

TICO-19 link is in the first comment.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_covid-19-is-historys-biggest-translation-activity-6703357403636887552-xqU-).*
